name: Candy Shop Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels, divided
1 cup Cut-up fruit (such as bananas and strawberries), optional
1 cup Chopped candy bars (such as NESTLE CRUNCH bars, BUTTERFINGER bars, ALPINE WHITE bars, GOOBERS, and RAISINETS)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until creamy.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla extract. Gradually beat in the flour mixture.
5. Stir in 1 cup of NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate morsels.
6. Spread batter evenly in a lightly greased 12-inch to 14-inch pizza pan or 15 inch by 10 inch jelly-roll pan.
7. Bake for 20-24 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Immediately sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of semi-sweet chocolate morsels over the crust.
9. Drop spoonfuls of peanut butter onto the morsels.
10. Let stand 5 minutes, or until soft and shiny.
11. Gently spread chocolate and peanut butter over the crust.
12. Top with fruit and candy.
13. Cut into wedges.
14. Serve warm.
Makes about 12 servings.
